name: Richard Osman's House of Games Night
original_name: Richard Osman's House of Games Night
overview: Each week a group of four famous faces go toe-to-toe testing their general knowledge in a variety of entertaining games. The series includes all the favourite, funny games from the BBC Two series, with the addition of some new items for the prime time shows, including the appearance of a house band and some special guests. As ever, all of the games are rooted in general knowledge and can be played along at home by viewers.

trailers.title: Richard Osman's House of Games: Trailer | BBC Trailers
